content.en:
The Ancient Sea Ancestor didn't stay in the Xuanxu Saint Realm for long, and left quickly.

And when he left, he also left quietly.

After all, the War Tower can temporarily descend to the area where another War Tower is located, which is also a secret inside the Battle Gate, and it is not known to outsiders.

If Ye Tian hadn't discovered this secret, Zhanmen wouldn't have told him, unless he stepped into the Invincible Domain Ancestor realm and had a relatively high status, he would be qualified to know this secret.

......

Qingyuan Holy Land.

The Qingfeng Holy Lord knew about the situation in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and immediately went to question the Weeping Blood Emperor.

He immediately summoned the Weeping Blood Emperor.

"Weeping Blood Emperor, you failed to rescue the two invincible domain ancestors of our Qingyuan Holy Land, what do you say?"

The Blue Blade Holy Lord asked.

The Weeping Blood Emperor said angrily: "Qingfeng Holy Lord, I met the Ancient Sea Ancestor, can I be blamed for this?In order to save your two invincible domain ancestors of the Qingyuan Holy Land, I fell a clone and suffered heavy losses, it's not bad if I don't trouble you, you still dare to question me?"

The Blue Blade Holy Lord snorted coldly: "Forget it, but if you haven't completed the task I gave you, the Thousand Blood Treasure Lotus and the Phoenix Blood Soul Fruit won't give it to you!"

"Qingfeng Holy Lord, I paid the price of a clone for your Qingyuan Holy Land, and you didn't compensate at all?"

Weeping Blood Emperor Road.

"Nope!"

The Blue Blade Holy Lord said directly.

"Okay, don't think about cooperating with me in the future!"

The Weeping Blood Emperor said angrily.

The two immediately cut off contact.

The matter of the Weeping Blood Emperor, the Qingfeng Holy Lord no longer thinks about it, he is very distressed now.

The Qingyuan Realm Bead was lost, and Ye Tian was afraid that he would soon know that it was the Qingyuan Holy Land that made the move, and if he informed the Battle Gate, the Battle Gate would definitely hit the Qingyuan Holy Land.

"I hope the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain will not tell the Battle Gate!"

The Blue Blade Holy Lord thought to himself.

Then, he stopped thinking about it and immediately went into retreat.

If he can impact the realm of the Peerless Domain Ancestors, the Qingyuan Holy Land has two Peerless Domain Ancestors, his strength will inevitably increase greatly, but he is not afraid of other Holy Lands, nor is he afraid that the status of the Qingyuan Holy Land will not be guaranteed, even if it is a battle gate, it is impossible to let them fall casually.

----------------

The human world.

Ye Tian began to sort out the treasures of the two Invincible Domain Ancestors, and I have to say that the Invincible Domain Ancestor is richer, much richer than the Supreme Domain Ancestor.

Soon, Ye Tian found the Qingyuan Boundary Bead.

"This Relic ......"

Ye Tian saw a void inside through the Qingyuan Realm Bead, and the saint-level ore vein was sealed inside this Qingyuan Realm Bead.

"A very powerful holy artifact actually directly sealed a void and intercepted the saint-level ore vein. Such a holy relic is not cheap!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Later, he investigated and found out what the relict was.

"The Qingyuan Realm Bead, which is ranked 2199th on the Holy Relic List, belongs to the Qingyuan Holy Land, and sure enough, the information learned from the two invincible domain ancestors was correct from their personal introductions. This time, it is the idea of the Qingyuan Holy Land to fight the saint-level ore vein!"

Ye Tian was very dissatisfied with the Qingyuan Holy Land.

However, after all, the other party is a holy land, even if it ranks at the bottom of the holy land, but there is still a background, and it is almost unrealistic to want to overthrow the Qingyuan Holy Land at once.

He didn't bother to inform the battle gate, so as not to cause the Qingyuan Holy Land to retaliate frantically.

After all, once the Qingyuan Holy Land is in a desperate situation, it will really take revenge on the human race.

The Terrans are too weak now, and they still need to develop.

"Wait until you have a chance to destroy the Qingyuan Holy Land again!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he put away the Qingyuan Realm Bead, and this Qingyuan Realm Bead alone was enough to make the Qingyuan Holy Land suffer a heavy loss.

Subsequently, Ye Tian unsealed the saint-level ore vein from the Qingyuan Realm Bead and placed it in a void in the human world, allowing the domain ancestors of the human race to mine it.

For the Terrans, the Saint-level ore veins are not currently needed, but they can be traded with other domain ancestors, and can even be traded with the War Realm Tower, so as to obtain a large number of resources needed by the Terrans.

Moreover, once the Terrans gave birth to a saint-level refiner, these saint-level veins would be of great use.

In short, the Saint-level vein is an incomparably important strategic resource for a force.

In the following days, the Xuanxu Holy Realm spent a period of peace.

Ye Tian has also been practicing in retreat, constantly improving his soul holy light.

However, it is very difficult for the Soul Light to improve, and without great chance, the rate of progress will be very slow.

-----------------

In the blink of an eye, 100 million years have passed in the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

For the domain ancestors, 100 million years is not a long time.

But for the human race, 100 million years is a long time.

Nowadays, the Terrans have changed too much.

Not to mention that the Terran Domain Ancestor has increased dozens of times, and the Supreme Domain Ancestor alone has been born in double digits.

For example, Ye Tian's relatives have basically stepped into the Supreme Domain Ancestral Realm, and several geniuses of the Human Race with relatively good talents have also entered the Supreme Domain Ancestral Realm.

In addition to the Supreme Domain Ancestor, there are also many top Domain Ancestors of the Human Race.

The Xuanxu Saint Realm is very rich in resources, and there are many opportunities to help the Domain Ancestors impact the top Domain Ancestors, so the Domain Ancestors of the Human Race can impact the top Domain Ancestors realm with a little good opportunity.

This resulted in many, many top domain ancestors of the human race, even much more than the top domain ancestors of many sects in the Dark Sacred Domain.

In terms of overall strength, the human race is already comparable to the sect-level forces of the Dark Sacred Domain.

At this time, Ye Tian also made some progress, but unfortunately the progress was not very fast, and the soul holy light only increased by thirty percent.

In 100 million years, the Soul Holy Light has only increased by 30%, which is simply too slow for the previous progress.

"It's no wonder that those supreme domain ancestors of the Dark Sacred Domain all want all kinds of opportunities, and even work hard for a treasure, it's really that the progress of penance cultivation is too slow!" Ye Tian sighed.

This is still because he has the cultivation increase of the Xuanxu Saint Realm and the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, so that he can increase the soul holy light by thirty percent in 100 million years, and if it is other supreme domain ancestors, the 100 million year fragment is afraid that the soul holy light will be increased by one percent at most.

this day.

Just as Ye Tian was cultivating, he clearly sensed that an amazing treasure was about to be born in the depths of the void of the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

This treasure has not yet been born, but it has already caused the shock of the origin of the Xuanxu Holy Realm.

Others may not be able to feel it, but as the Lord of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, he senses it too obviously.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's gaze passed through the depths of the void and saw the infinite depths.

Soon, the phantom of that treasure appeared in front of Ye Tian.

It was an incomparably ancient stone tablet, and the stone tablet showed the fluctuations of the world.

Seeing this, Ye Tian immediately recognized it.

"Holy Monument!"
